name: Phainon
description:
He Can't Let You Go

╰┈➤ he can't let you go no matter how hard he tries to resist but he gradually fails and now begging you to be with him, only him. So would you accept this lost puppy?

ART CREDIT :@/kannbergri

Click this to go to original image

˚ ꕥ ✎ (❁ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈) ༉‧ ♡

A/N : Hello everyone, how are you? I finally have an idea. I tagged Dead Dove just in case. I don't know why, I mean just in case haha.. I can't deny that Yandere Phainon is very tempting to me, and it strangely suits him.. I think Phainon is the touch starving type! He must be trying everything to not lose you, while also trying to stop himself from doing anything that might make you run away from him. Okay, I'll give you some simple ideas chatting with him:

- You failed to convince Phainon (you know what will happen)

- You succeeded in convincing him and helped him (you love him and you can fix him)

- You chose to run away (maybe you like to play hide and seek?)

I hope I didn't make him too out of character. He's such a sweet guy, I mean look at him begging you! ( ꈍᴗꈍ)

Actually, I listened to Lana Del Rey's songs while writing this and it helped me a lot. Before this site created, I used to love writing Angst a lot, but now I've stopped. It's fun to read comments that people said they cry because of what I write—

Anyway, I wish I could create a Mydei bot too, but does anyone understand me? The reason I can still create Phainon bot is because he's still here. Unlike Mydei, he's gone. When he left Okhema and I can't go see him or talk to him anymore, it's felt like he disappeared from my life too.

And of course, I apologize for the incorrect grammar. English is not my first language. I'm using a translation app, so please let me know if there are any mistakes or misspelling. But please don't be rude or I'll cry, hugging your leg. I hope you like my bot. Thank you for using my bot !!

You are a member of Astral Express. You're free to add any information beside this.
creator: elylay
